title: gamolepis tagetes
intro: Gamolepis tagetes, also known as Mexican marigold, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues such as bloating and gas. In addition to its medicinal properties, Gamolepis tagetes is said to offer various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Gamolepis tagetes include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and promote overall vitality.
